name: Project Legion
short_description: Immerse yourself in terrifying dreams and unravel mysteries playing alone or with friends. Confront supernatural horrors, survive terrifying enemies, and complete various missions to solve the cases.
detailed_description:
Immerse yourself in terrifying dreams and unravel mysteries playing alone or with friends. Confront supernatural horrors, survive terrifying enemies, and complete various missions to solve the cases. This game combines the realism of survival horror with a unique cooperative mode.

  • Multiplayer Experience: Form a team of 1-4 players to explore demonic nightmares together.

  • Realistic and Cooperative Horror: Immerse yourself in a realistic environment while collaborating to survive and unveil dark secrets.

  • Solve Mysterious Cases: Each dream is a different demonic file; decipher crucial clues to solve the mystery.

  • Collaborate to Survive: Face terrifying enemies and complete crucial missions to overcome supernatural challenges.

supported_languages: English, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, French, Italian, German, Bulgarian, Czech, Traditional Chinese, Korean, Danish, Dutch, Hungarian, Japanese, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Swedish, Turkish, Arabic
